extraction.one_line_summary: VAN BAARLE Dylan won after INEOS controlled the finale, emerging from chasing group after early crosswind split to beat VERMEERSCH and KÜNG in velodrome sprint
tactical_patterns: INEOS split peloton early using crosswinds on normal roads before cobbles, forcing VAN DER POEL/PEDERSEN to chase from 1:14 deficit
VAN BAARLE won from chasing group that bridged up, suggesting early splits don't always determine winner in Roubaix
VAN DER POEL let too many moves go despite bridging early split, revealing energy management failure after hard chase

rider_signals.VAN BAARLE Dylan: positive: only rider with strength to lift bike at finish, transformed from 2021 time-cut elimination to winner
rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: negative: chased back from early split but failed tactically by letting decisive moves go, well beaten at finish
rider_signals.LAMPAERT Yves: negative: crashed when in contention for podium/win, finished outside top positions despite strong ride
rider_signals.PEDERSEN Mads: negative: caught behind early crosswind split at 1:14, crashed before cobbles even started, day ruined early
rider_signals.KÜNG Stefan: positive: third place after being hampered by late chasers joining, strong ride throughout
rider_signals.VERMEERSCH Florian: positive: second place as regional rider, emerged from chaos to nearly win
rider_signals.STUYVEN Jasper: positive: eighth despite appearing dead final 50km, exceptional resilience under duress
rider_signals.TURNER Ben: positive: key domestique work helping VAN BAARLE win, solid 10th/11th after hard day
